headline: Humana reaffirms its FY 2026 guidance of at least $8.89 in GAAP EPS and $9.00 in Adjusted EPS ahead of March investor meetings.
investor_impact: Reaffirming previously issued guidance signals operational stability and confirms the company is tracking to plan, removing near-term uncertainty ahead of management's March conference circuit. While the lack of a guidance raise limits immediate upside catalysts, it protects against downside risk.
key_figures: At least $8.89 FY 2026 GAAP diluted EPS guidance
At least $9.00 FY 2026 Adjusted EPS guidance
March 2, 2026 to March 31, 2026 (dates for investor and analyst meetings)
February 11, 2026 (date of previous press release issuing consistent guidance)
